name: environment_satellite_derived_millhaven_st_lt
premise: Downwind monitors tripped near a chemical corridor; plant managers claim instrument fault while residents report symptoms. In Environment, the situation tagged internally around environment satellite derived millhaven st lt has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. Framing has already hardened externally as short term against long term; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Inez Haddad
agents.identity: I am Inez Haddad, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Environment. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Noah Berg
agents.identity: I am Noah Berg, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Environment. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect long term.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to long term to secure short term before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Inez Haddad must choose under short term versus long term. What does Inez Haddad do?
